title: Redemption Center
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Redemption}}
The '''Redemption Center''' was a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] located on [[the Rig]] space station, used to store those collected by members of the [[Crimson Nova]] chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. It was headed by [[Looie]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]]
